Kings Casino: Legal Notices

Consent Notice By accessing and playing Kings Casino, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. Your continued use of this application constitutes your consent to the collection and use of data as described, including the use of local storage for game progress, browser-based notifications, and the tracking of playtime to facilitate time-gated mechanics. If you do not agree to these terms, please discontinue use of the game immediately.

Terms of Use

  1. Eligibility & Age Restriction
    Kings Casino is intended for entertainment purposes only for users aged 18 and older. By playing, you represent that you meet the legal age requirement in your jurisdiction.
  2. Virtual Currency & Items
    • All coins, chips, tickets, and virtual items are for entertainment purposes only.
    • They hold no real-world monetary value and cannot be exchanged for cash or real-world goods.
    • Virtual items are non-transferable and remain the sole property of Kings Casino.
  3. Gameplay Mechanics
    • Time-Gated Features: Certain features, such as the Piggy Bank or Prize Wheel, rely on real-time tracking. We are not responsible for technical interruptions that may delay or reset your progress timers.
    • Service Workers: This game utilizes Service Workers to provide offline functionality and push notifications. By playing, you consent to the storage of game data on your device to ensure a seamless experience.
  4. Limitation of Liability
    The game is provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free. To the fullest extent permitted by law, StadiaStudios shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from your use of this application.
  5. Updates to Terms
    We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be reflected in this document. Continued use of the game following any updates signifies your acceptance of the revised terms.
Last Updated: June 9, 2026
